labels.analysis: The MCP Server "zip1.io" provides 4 tools for ai/ml tools tasks.
labels.reasoning: Primary label "AI/ML Tools" assigned based on tool names and descriptions.

tools.description: Create a shortened URL using zip1.io with optional custom alias, password protection, and max clicks limit

alias.description: Custom alias for the short URL (optional, alphanumeric and hyphens only)

description.description: Description for the short URL (optional, max 100 characters)

max_clicks.description: Maximum number of clicks allowed before the link expires (optional)

password.description: Password to protect the short URL (optional)

url.description: The long URL to shorten (must include http:// or https://)

tools.name: create_short_url

tools.description: Get detailed statistics and analytics for a shortened URL including click counts, countries, and recent activity

short_code.description: The short code or custom alias of the URL to get stats for

tools.name: get_url_stats

tools.description: Check if a URL is valid and can be shortened by zip1.io
tools.name: validate_url

tools.description: Generate a random 6-character alphanumeric short code suggestion (the actual code will be generated when creating the URL)
tools.name: generate_short_code
